Support

Help, documentation, and policies

Everything here uses the same brand system as the rest of the site—clear, direct, and easy to navigate.

Security

How we think about access, encryption, and infrastructure.

Privacy

What we collect, what we avoid, and where data lives.

Terms

Baseline terms for using our site and products.

Documentation

Product documentation will be published here alongside each product.

Hardship

Products are not offered today. When anything is made available in the future, accommodations and contact paths will be described in policy updates—not via marketing forms on this site.

Three premium desktop products—local-first, privacy-first, built around Steward.
